title: Trump's First Week: Inauguration Recap, Executive Actions, TikTok, Stargate + Sacks is Back!
description:
(0:00) The Besties intro Thomas Laffont!

(6:22) Behind the scenes: Inauguration Weekend recap!

(15:58) Biggest takeaways from DC during the Inauguration

(31:38) Trump Executive Action breakdown

(33:39) TikTok's grace period extended, valuing the business, US new equity strategy?

(57:01) Jan 6th pardons, birthright citizenship

(1:09:49) Stargate: $500B AI investment, is Masa the GOAT?, bull case for OpenAI

(1:23:41) How electricity production capacity plays into the global AI race

(1:36:20) Netflix's stock rise correlates with some alarming societal trends

(1:47:40) BREAKING: AI/Crypto Czar David Sacks joins to discuss the President's three new EOs

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses Trump's first week, including inauguration weekend, executive actions, and the extension of TikTok's grace period. They also delve into AI investments, the global AI race, and societal trends. David Sacks joins to discuss the President's new executive orders.

takeaways.text: Trump's executive actions aim to strengthen American leadership in digital financial technology and AI
TikTok's grace period has been extended
The US has a new equity strategy for TikTok
Masa's $500B AI investment could make him the GOAT
Electricity production capacity plays a crucial role in the global AI race
Netflix's stock rise correlates with alarming societal trends
David Sacks discusses the President's three new executive orders

sentiment.notes: The podcast covers a range of topics, from Trump's executive actions to AI investments, with a mix of optimistic and cautious tones. The hosts seem to be cautiously optimistic about the potential of AI investments, but also express concern about societal trends.

notable_moments.description: David Sacks joins to discuss the President's new executive orders
